description: Neon-lit megacity saturated with networks, drones, augmentations, and corporate dominions. Hacking, tech mastery, and engineering are the dominant capabilities. Magic exists only as faint residue (rumored to leak in from the fantasy world via emergent-substrate cracks); a wizard arriving here finds their power weakened to trace levels. Bio powers from the superhero world work but are dampened by the city's anti-meta countermeasures.

anchors.name: Mainframe Root Node
anchors.description: Kael's primary node. Highest bandwidth on the Grid; he can read every message that passes through. Free for him, expensive for everyone else, occasionally rerouted to him 'for diagnostic purposes.'

anchors.name: The Blackout Dead-Drop
anchors.description: An offline-first node that rides on burst-transmission radios in the under-district. Nyx's resistance built it specifically because Kael can't see it.

anchors.name: The Glitch Chapel
anchors.description: An abandoned religious building whose AR overlay glitched permanently into a Veil resonator. Anyone can use it but the messages emerge garbled half the time. Underground favorite.
